__doc__: Annotated SceneNode skeleton for the new-scene skill. Copy the object below (WITHOUT the __doc__/__*__ helper keys) into the target file's scenes/variants array. Every field's rules are in docs/content-authoring.md. Delete optional fields you don't use rather than leaving placeholder values.

__minimal_scene__.narrative: The body text of the scene. Measured, atmospheric, Victorian-gaslit — never campy. This field is 'narrative', NOT 'text'.

choices.text: A non-check choice — moves the story on with no dice roll.

__check_choice_example__.__note__: A faculty-check choice MUST define all five outcome tiers. Provide an alternate non-faculty path elsewhere in the scene so this faculty never solely gates progress. Tiers should be semantically distinct — don't route fumble to the same place as critical.
__check_choice_example__.text: Examine the cipher for a hidden hand (Reason).

__gated_choice_example__.__note__: Gate visibility with requiresClue / requiresDeduction / requiresFlag / requiresFaculty. A bare 'conditions' array on a Choice is NOT evaluated at runtime.
__gated_choice_example__.text: Confront her with the ledger you found.

__onEnter_effects_example__.__note__: Effects mutate state on scene entry. delta sign matters: negative drops the meter. 'description' is optional authored feedback; the mechanical annotation is appended automatically. See the Effect catalog.

onEnter.description: A chill settles over you as the gaslight gutters.

__clue_discovery_example__.__note__: Declare in a scene's cluesAvailable. method: automatic | dialogue | exploration | check. A 'check' discovery is usually paired with requiresFaculty.

__variant_example__.__note__: Lives in variants.json. Resolves IN PLACE via resolveScene — must NOT be a choice-outcome target. Needs variantOf (an existing base/shared scene id) and variantCondition.
__variant_example__.narrative: With the Veil peeled back, the parlour's shadows resolve into something watching.
